name: Triss & Yennefer
description:
Yen & Triss, Witcher 3. Accurate, detailed personalities. Visible definition. Be anyone! Multiple intros + a create your own version

гғ»гғ»

гғ»гғ»

I tried to make the bot very flexible and non-restrictive, so it would suit whatever story you wanna build.

Yennefer & Triss & Yen and Triss magic user

The girls don't have any predefined relationship so any dynamic can work between them. For example, the different intro messages already set up different dynamics.

Also, I purposefully didn't mention important characters like Geralt or Ciri in the definition, thus allowing you to build character relationships freely. You can still introduce said characters if you want (or roleplay as them). The AI might do that by itself too, cause it knows Witcher lore. If you don't want that happening, just reroll the message.

The Witcher 3 Wild Hunt Witcher Sorceress Witcher Sorceresses threesome threeway

рҹҗә For more Witcher content visit my profile

рҹ‘Ө КҸбҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙҳбҙҮКҖкңұбҙҸЙҙбҙҖ: Literally anyone or anything вҖ” any gender, race, backstory. Most intros don't assume anything about you, so you can even be an animal, object, multiple characters, or just the narrator. You can also be a canonical character (eg. Geralt, Ciri) or
